meta.title: For Agencies & Prime Contractors - CaltransBizConnect
meta.description: Agencies and prime contractors: Post opportunities, find qualified Small Business Enterprises, and manage your contracting needs.

fields.title: For Agencies & Prime Contractors
fields.subtitle: Find qualified Small Business Enterprises, post structured opportunities, and streamline your contractor outreach with CaltransBizConnect.

cards.title: Post Structured Opportunities
cards.body: Create detailed opportunity listings that attract the most qualified SBE vendors for your project requirements.

cards.title: Find Qualified Vendors
cards.body: Search our directory of pre-screened SBEs by district, certification, and work category to find the right partners.

cards.title: Manage Contracting
cards.body: Track applications, communicate with vendors, and manage your contracting workflow all in one place.

fields.heading: Opportunity Posting Requirements
fields.body: All agency opportunity postings must include a clear project description, required certifications, district location, estimated value, and submission deadline. This ensures vendors can accurately assess fit and submit complete proposals.

fields.heading: Start Finding Qualified SBEs
fields.text: Register your agency today to post opportunities and connect with our SBE network.
